title: Expect 100-continue, Early Responses, Body Rejection, and Draining
description: A server reads a huge body before authentication, sends 100 after a final response, drains attacker bytes without bounds, and lets client and server wait on each other forever. Learners cumulatively produce expectation and early-response coordination state machine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Parse Expect, support 100-continue deliberately, and return appropriate final failure for unsupported expectations.
Send 100 Continue only after header-level policy accepts receiving content and before a final response commits.
Bound client waiting for 100, handle early final responses, and avoid sending content after rejection.
